title: WTF is with Kaworu and Asuka shipping
display_title: WTF is with Kaworu and Asuka shipping
wikitext:
[]: WTF is with Kaworu and Asuka (shipping)?             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:07 pm I see a lot of fan art and even on avatars around here with Kaworu and Asuka gettin' all intimate. Simple question, where in the hell did this come from? When did Kaworu and Asuka even partly coincide with each other, other than the time he hijacked her mama? I mean, if anything I could understand ReixKaworu fan fics popping up all over the place since AsukaxShinji are like the known duo and Rei's all by herself and they're both angelic and whatnot, but- Asuka and Kaworu? When did all this get started? They seriously do not even remotely look good together. Sorry Mr. Tines xD

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:10 pm number one, learn to spell Kaworu numbero dos, go ask EM, he was the OG on this

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:14 pm Well their are two answers to this question. One fandom has paired at some point every character with every other so Asuka x kaworu was going to hit at some point. Two It annoys me personally and Mr. TInes and the Eva Monkey seek to annoy me as I hate kaworu with a passion the jews normally reserve for German house painters. Having even his vestige near Asuka makes me want to hurl and they may even be using that in an attempt to end my life . That or they just think its cool one or the other. DD

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:19 pm Kaworu - LEARNED Well... Even if all characters get paired, that doesn't explain how prominent and often the pairing between those two is. And like the other guy said... It's stupid. Although I do enjoy Kaworu, I do not enjoy him with Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:23 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Kaworu - LEARNED Well... Even if all characters get paired, that doesn't explain how prominent and often the pairing between those two is. And like the other guy said... It's stupid. Although I do enjoy Kaworu, I do not enjoy him with Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:24 pm It's called the shipping fandom. When you enter the shipping fandom you can expect sensible, different, and sometimes bizzare pairings.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:25 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Well... Even if all characters get paired, that doesn't explain how prominent and often the pairing between those two is.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:40 pm In my eyes, its easily the funniest & most unexpected shipping out there I got nothing against it at all. Just harmless fun

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:41 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: In my eyes, its easily the funniest & most unexpected shipping out there

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:42 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: GasmaskAvenger wrote: In my eyes, its easily the funniest & most unexpected shipping out there

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:50 pm Urge to write fic were Asuka shoves a sawed off double barrel shotgun in freak boys face rising. . .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:56 pm Asuka and Kaworu look damn good together if I do say so myself. HOTNESS.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:56 pm I laugh at those who take shipping seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:59 pm I like the pairing. Almost complete opposites becoming a couple.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:01 pm Sammaeloo wrote: I like the pairing. Almost complete opposites becoming a couple.

[]: Re: So uh... WTF is with Kaworu and Asuka?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:11 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: When did Kaworu and Asuka even partly coincide with each other, other than the time he hijacked her mama?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:13 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka and Kaworu look damn good together if I do say so myself. HOTNESS.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:14 pm I like it better than A/S shipping, so I say run with it.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:34 pm Because they are the original OTP, and is the most amusing one out there, and it annoys DatDude.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Oct 05, 2009 12:53 am There's something else that goes into this. In the Digimon fandom, there were basically eight kids: five boys and three girls. Two of them were younger than the rest, so they were paired. That leaves four boys and two girls. What would frequently happen is that the leader and the main girl would be paired and the second most prominent male would get the other girl as a consolation prize. (Sometimes the other two boys would win out, but generally only when the first pairing was removed). So, to use the same sort of psychology, people who don't like A/S and prefer Asuka as a character have to give her a coupling. She clashes with Toji too much, Kensuke is unpopular, and everyone else is female or not her age. So Kaworu is the remaining male and thus she gets him. Sometimes this coincides with S/R, sometimes it doesn't (in much the same way that being an S/A fan doesn't mean you're a K/R fan).
summary: []: WTF is with Kaworu and Asuka (shipping)?             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Sun Oct 04, 2009 10:07 pm I see a lot of fan art and even on avatars around here with Kaworu and Asuka gettin' all intimate. Simple question, where in the hell did this come from? When did Kaworu and Asuka even partly coincide with each other, other than the time he hijacked her mama? I mean, if anything I could understand ReixKaworu fan fics popping
